genes.summary: Recover from validation or runtime failures with the smallest reversible fix.
strategy: Extract structured signals from logs and user instructions
Select an existing Gene by signals match without improvisation
Validate using repo-appropriate commands and rollback on failure
Record the outcome in the evolution assets

genes.summary: Tighten Evolver prompts and asset wiring while keeping validation aligned with this repository.
preconditions: need stricter, auditable evolution protocol outputs
strategy: Inspect prompt and asset surfaces that affect reviewer clarity
Prefer existing genes and assets over inventing new workflow layers
Reduce ambiguity while preserving repository-specific guardrails
Validate with MoonBitMark's canonical repo checks

genes.summary: Keep Evolver on registered tools and honest failure reporting instead of shell workarounds.
preconditions: agent used shell or exec to do work that a registered tool can handle
strategy: Prefer registered tools over ad-hoc shell detours
Report the actual failing command and root cause
Do not fabricate recovery steps or hidden helper scripts

genes.summary: Improve competition-facing reviewer flow, docs coherence, and demo polish with minimal blast radius.
preconditions: the user wants final competition polish instead of broad feature expansion
strategy: Inspect README, competition docs, and example paths for missing reviewer shortcuts
Prefer 1 to 3 low-risk changes in docs, examples, or diagnostics visibility
Add or tighten a shortest-path demonstration from sample input to Markdown and diagnostics output
Improve explainability and credibility without hiding bridge-backed boundaries
Validate any touched paths with the lightest relevant checks and keep blast radius small
